name: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Zero Payload Bidirectional Flows
notes: This Building Block identifies bidirectional traffic that doesn't include payload.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Zero Payload Bidirectional Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the source byte/packet ratio is less than 65 bytes/packet
when the destination byte/packet ratio is less than 65 bytes/packet
when the source/destination packet ratio is equal to 1
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Zero Payload Bidirectional Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source byte/packet ratio is less than 65 bytes/packet
AND when the destination byte/packet ratio is less than 65 bytes/packet
AND when the source/destination packet ratio is equal to 1
